headline: 9 core contracts identified: stake pool, token mint, manager, authorities, and auxiliary accounts on Solana

findings.text: Solana Compass block explorer reveals 8VpRhuxa7sUUepdY3kQiTmX9rS5vx4WgaXiAnXq4KCtr as JupSOL stake pool with named roles for all associated accounts.

Official deployment documentation sourced from Solana Compass stake pool page and confirmed via DeFiLlama and Sanctum/Jupiter sources; pool token mint jupSoLaHXQiZZTSfEWMTRRgpnyFm8f6sZdosWBjx93v identified.
SPL Stake Pool Program audited by Neodyme, OtterSec, and Kudelski Security per multiple sources; audits cited in Sanctum and Messari documentation but audit PDFs not directly fetched.
Jupiter organization (jup-ag) identified on GitHub with 168 repositories; specific JupSOL deployment artifacts not yet enumerated from repo walk.
Solana mainnet only; no multi-chain deployment evident from sources reviewed.
Stake pool does not enumerate child pools via factory pattern; delegated to ~4 active validators as per Solana Compass epoch 962 data.
9 addresses catalogued with roles: stake_pool, pool_mint, pool_manager, staker_authority, stake_deposit_authority, pool_withdraw_authority, validator_list_storage, manager_fee_account, reserve_stake.
All addresses traced to Solana Compass stake pool page (fetched) and supported by secondary sources (Sanctum blog, DeFiLlama); addresses in admin_addresses[] backed by evidence[].

rationale.verdict: Discovery task completed. Walked official explorer pages, documentation sites, and audit references to surface 9 core protocol addresses on Solana mainnet. All addresses cited in evidence[] entries.

evidence.shows: Complete stake pool configuration including manager (8JS6XsMPo2u3EyeeY3p2jvzHEhdUtCKgarHpJ3PAonyv), staker (EG976hUYS3Mwf595uk9irszydggWzB3tBDobbMffyScq), authorities, pool mint (jupSoLaHXQiZZTSfEWMTRRgpnyFm8f6sZdosWBjx93v), and reserve accounts.

SPL Stake Pool Program authority secured by multisig with members from Sanctum, Jupiter, Mango, marginfi, and Jito; governance requires majority vote for changes; no single party can unilaterally change the program.
Protocol identified on DeFiLlama with links to GitHub code repositories and documentation of TVL, fees, and revenue collection.
JUPSOL built on SPL Stake Pool Program; multisig governance includes Sanctum, Jupiter, Mango, marginfi, and Jito; audited by referenced security firms; managed over $1B in staked SOL.
Jupiter organization with 168 repositories; maintains CLI and multiple integration products.

unknowns: D2: deployed_contracts_doc – No single canonical 'Deployed Contracts' page located; addresses sourced from explorer-aggregated data rather than official docs index.
D3: Audit PDFs – Referenced audits (Neodyme, OtterSec, Kudelski Security) cited in secondary sources but underlying audit reports not directly fetched.
D4: GitHub deployment artifacts – jup-ag organization identified but specific Foundry/Hardhat deployment scripts or address indexes not yet enumerated from repository walk.
D6: factory-discovered children – Stake pool uses static validator delegation pattern, not factory-enumerable child contracts; validator set changes via authority transactions, not creation events.

protocol_metadata.about: Jupiter Staked SOL (JUPSOL) is a liquid staking token on Solana that allows users to deposit SOL and receive a liquid, tradable token representing their staked position while earning staking rewards and MEV kickbacks. Built on the audited SPL Stake Pool Program, JupSOL enables participation in DeFi without locking staked assets, with governance secured by a multisig of major ecosystem participants (Sanctum, Jupiter, Mango, marginfi, Jito).
